CVE-2013-2131.title: Format string vulnerability in the rrdtool module 1.4.7 for Pytho ...
CVE-2013-2131.summary: Format string vulnerability in the rrdtool module 1.4.7 for Python, as used in Zenoss, allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via format string specifiers to the rrdtool.graph function.
